0.text: Previously observed infiltrates within the left lung without appreciable regression

1.text: New area of infiltration in the lateral segment of the right middle lobe

2.text: Ground glass nodule measuring 0.5 cm in diameter in the mediobasal segment of the left lower lobe

3.text: New micronodular opacities in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

4.text: Minimal increases in ground glass density in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe
